summary: Honest UX Messaging Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The misleading 'vérifiée automatiquement via votre connexion' text has been removed from InvitationPage.js (line 589). Provider-specific messaging is correctly implemented: Teams/Zoom show 'Récupération automatique via {provider}', Meet shows 'Import manuel requis — Google Meet'. Auto-fetch scheduler job is registered. Physical appointments correctly don't show video evidence section.

backend: auto_fetch_attendance_service.py exists with correct logic (Zoom/Teams only, not Meet)
frontend_code_verification: AppointmentDetail.js does NOT contain 'vérifiée automatiquement via votre connexion'
InvitationPage.js has 'Votre présence sera vérifiée après la réunion via le rapport du provider' (2 occurrences)
InvitationPage.js does NOT contain 'vérifiée automatiquement via votre connexion' (FIXED)
Video evidence section is conditional on appointment_type === 'video'
frontend_ui: Teams appointment shows 'Récupération automatique via Teams' message
Teams appointment shows 'Réunion en cours ou à venir' evidence status
Teams appointment shows 'Récupérer les présences' button
Meet appointment shows 'Import requis — Google Meet' evidence status
Meet appointment shows 'Importer le rapport de présence' button (prominent amber)
Physical appointment does NOT show video evidence section

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: InvitationPage.js line 589 had old misleading text 'Votre présence sera vérifiée automatiquement via votre connexion à la réunion.' - Changed to 'Votre présence sera vérifiée après la réunion via le rapport du provider.'
Backend scheduler.py correctly registers auto_fetch_attendance_job at line 104-110 with name 'Auto-fetch Zoom/Teams attendance after meeting ends'
Backend auto_fetch_attendance_service.py correctly limits AUTO_FETCH_PROVIDERS to {'zoom', 'teams', 'microsoft teams'} - Meet is excluded because it has no attendance API
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly implements provider-specific messaging at lines 1295-1325 with hasAutoFetch check for zoom/teams
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly implements evidence action bar at lines 1620-1706 with provider-specific UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Honest UX messaging fully tested and fixed. Key verified features: (1) Teams/Zoom check-in shows 'Récupération automatique via {provider}' with data-testid='checkin-msg-auto-fetch', (2) Meet check-in shows 'Import manuel requis — Google Meet' with data-testid='checkin-msg-manual-import', (3) Teams/Zoom evidence section shows 'Réunion en cours ou à venir' with data-testid='evidence-status-waiting' and 'Récupérer les présences' button, (4) Meet evidence section shows 'Import requis — Google Meet' with data-testid='evidence-status-meet-manual' and prominent 'Importer le rapport de présence' button, (5) Physical appointments do NOT show video evidence section, (6) InvitationPage.js now uses 'Votre présence sera vérifiée après la réunion via le rapport du provider' in both before-window and during-window states (FIXED line 589), (7) Backend scheduler has auto_fetch_attendance_job registered.

fix_applied.old_text: Votre présence sera vérifiée automatiquement via votre connexion à la réunion.
fix_applied.new_text: Votre présence sera vérifiée après la réunion via le rapport du provider.
fix_applied.reason: The old text was misleading - it promised 'automatic real-time verification' which doesn't exist. The new text honestly explains that verification happens after the meeting via the provider's attendance report.
